itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hello madam,
 I am Sudhir Mane, father of Shivansh Mane (sr kg A class).  "I am very impressed with the innovative curriculum and teaching methods. Using interactive tools, teachers make learning enjoyable and encourage students to think beyond textbooks".
"The teachers are excellent at identifying each student's strengths and meeting their needs. We have seen a remarkable improvement in our child's skills and confidence in just one year".
"My son's confidence, communication skills and academic performance have improved tremendously since joining. The teachers create a very encouraging environment".
"Amazing school with supportive teachers! My son has made great progress and is really enjoying the learning environment". Special thanks Anita Das Teacher 
"Highly recommended! A caring, safe and academically enriching place for children".
Regards 
Sudhir mane.

I have had a very disappointing experience with this school. The principal and several teachers come across as arrogant, and there is very little personal attention given to children. Parent-teacher interactions are rare, and concerns are not taken seriously. The management appears disorganized, and overall, the learning environment does not support children’s growth or well-being.
At this point, I would not recommend this school to anyone looking for a positive and supportive educational atmosphere for their child.

Vidyanchal Pre school is an excellent Pre school .My daughter has been in Vidyanchal Pre school for the last 6  months. I have seen a 
phenomenal change in her personality. She has become 
socially active, more attentive
 and alert. I am highly satisfied with the course of structure.
 Teachers and caregivers are 
very supportive and pay direct 
attention to all kids. This gave 
me enough satisfaction that 
teacher’s are really paying 
personal attention to each and 
every child in the class. I really
 would like to thank Ujjwala 
ma'am and all other Jr KG 
teachers for putting loads of 
efforts in raising Samruddhi so
 well. I would like to thank 
Anita ma'am for providing us 
with a safe and good 
environment .They are very 
responsive to parents query as well as their 
concerns.
Vidyanchal Pre school is really a partner to us which helps in our child’s upbringing. We 
highly recommend Vidyanchal
 Pre school.🥰 Thank you 🥰
One of the best schools in Pune for pre primary kids. the teachers and overall staff are really co operative. Even the extra curricular sports activities in the school is something to look upon.

Pre- primary school is very nice and nice extracurricular activities and festival celebration which help  children to  know all our tradisitions and their importance, whole staff supportive teaching and non-teaching as well, we are getting lots of support through out the year , teachers are very kind and they know very nicely how handle kids thery are really very experts in their own way as needed a preprimary kids , this is the first step for kids and  basic is perfect thn it will be easy to learn things for kids ...so it's necessary n blessings to found a good teacher in this step ...so we are blessed to having this kind of school and teachers .
The turf made is really good n gives a perfect grip to the players I personally played there n like the quality of grass n the maintenance is also good fantastic 👍 ,  must try

Pre-school is very good. 1st onwards the teaching is average and usual, nothing innovative or creative. The teachers are not that competent for an english medium school. Safety is big concern for the school, only one guard for the whole school. Stray cattles/animals come in the school without hesitation. Anybody can enter the premises with absolutely no check. Overall moderate academics and incompetent management/staff.

Initially, I was very happy with the school as the Pre primary section is managed really well. Teachers of Pre primary not just teach well but also take care of kids like a family, Anita teacher is the best teacher and I would always be thankful to her.
The issues start as soon as kids go to primary section. There is no management, online classes not at all managed properly. No proper notices are given. Kids of class I are pushed to join offline class even when parents are not giving concent. Online classes are stopped abruptly without prior notice. In Offline classes parents are complaining that no COVID protocol is followed. IN SHORT, EVERYTHING IS MESSED UP
